history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An image shows a stylized dark red background with decorative shapes and a centered user-interface style message in Indonesian.

Main Subject:
Centered graphic with a circular profile-like icon above large text that reads “SELAMAT JALAN,” followed by smaller lines of text and a rounded button-like element.

Setting:
The background appears to be a blurred, abstract scene indoors or outdoors is unclear, with no clearly identifiable real environment; lighting is dim and tinted red, suggesting a digital or design overlay rather than a photo.

Visual Details:
The background is dominated by deep red and burgundy tones with semi-transparent overlays, curved and line-based shapes, and faint decorative elements. In the center, a white circular icon with a gray outer ring sits above the main headline. Beneath it, the headline “SELAMAT JALAN” appears in large, bold, pinkish-red uppercase letters. Below the headline are additional centered lines in white text: “Sampai Jumpa Kembali” and a third line with mixed white text and slashes that includes “Kayz x Hutao II Assisten [1]”. Near the bottom center, a pill-shaped red button outline or filled shape contains white text reading “489 Left”. The overall layout is symmetrical and centered, with a transparent overlay effect across the image.

Visible Text:
SELAMAT JALAN
Sampai Jumpa Kembali
Kayz x Hutao II Assisten [1]
489 Left

Practical Summary:
The image displays a centered goodbye-style message with a profile icon on top. It includes a secondary line of text and a pill-shaped indicator showing “489 Left” over a red abstract background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
